// ============================================================
// CORVID 2.0 | managers/database/person-db
// Person record schema and operations.
// A person is anyone whose identity has been discovered  - 
// from whois, mail files, or social engineering.
//
// Schema:
//   id        string    -  auto-generated e.g. "p_001"
//   name      string    -  full name
//   email     string    -  primary email address
//   org_id    string    -  linked organisation ID
//   ips       list      -  known public IPs
//   lan_ips   list      -  known LAN IPs
//   notes     string    -  freeform notes
//   source    string    -  how discovered: whois | mail | manual
// ============================================================

PersonDb = {}
PersonDb.db = null

PersonDb.findByEmail = function(email)
    matchEmail = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("email") and record.email == email
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchEmail)
end function

PersonDb.findByName = function(name)
    matchName = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("name") and record.name.indexOf(name) != null
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchName)
end function

PersonDb.findByIp = function(ip)
    matchIp = function(record)
        if record.hasIndex("ips") and record.ips.indexOf(ip) != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("lan_ips") and record.lan_ips.indexOf(ip) != null then
            return true
        end if
        return false
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchIp)
end function

PersonDb.findByOrg = function(orgId)
    matchOrg = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("org_id") and record.org_id == orgId
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchOrg)
end function

PersonDb.search = function(term)
    // Broad search across name, email, notes
    term = lower(term)
    matchAny = function(record)
        if record.hasIndex("name")  and record.lower(name).indexOf(term)  != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("email") and record.lower(email).indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("notes") and record.lower(notes).indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        return false
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchAny)
end function

PersonDb.upsert = function(data)
    // Upsert by email  -  email is the natural key for a person
    if not data.hasIndex("email") or data.email.len == 0 then
        return Error.New("Person record requires an email address", "VALIDATION_ERROR")
    end if
    existing = self.findByEmail(data.email)
    if existing.len > 0 then
        record = existing[0]
        id     = record.id
        // Merge IPs
        if data.hasIndex("ips") then
            for ip in data.ips
                if record.ips.indexOf(ip) == null then
                    record.ips.push(ip)
                end if
            end for
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("lan_ips") then
            for ip in data.lan_ips
                if record.lan_ips.indexOf(ip) == null then
                    record.lan_ips.push(ip)
                end if
            end for
        end if
        // Update scalar fields if provided and non-empty
        if data.hasIndex("name")   and data.name.len   > 0 then
            record.name   = data.name
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id") and data.org_id.len > 0 then
            record.org_id = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes")  and data.notes.len  > 0 then
            record.notes  = data.notes
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    else
        id = self.db.nextId("p")
        record = {}
        record.id      = id
        record.name    = ""
        record.email   = data.email
        record.org_id  = ""
        record.ips     = []
        record.lan_ips = []
        record.notes   = ""
        record.source  = "unknown"
        if data.hasIndex("name")    then
            record.name    = data.name
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id")  then
            record.org_id  = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("ips")     then
            record.ips     = data.ips
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("lan_ips") then
            record.lan_ips = data.lan_ips
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes")   then
            record.notes   = data.notes
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("source")  then
            record.source  = data.source
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    end if
end function

PersonDb.get = function(id)
    return self.db.get(id)
end function

PersonDb.all = function()
    return self.db.all()
end function

PersonDb.addNote = function(id, note)
    record = self.db.get(id)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    if record.notes.len > 0 then
        record.notes = record.notes + char(10) + note
    else
        record.notes = note
    end if
    self.db.set(id, record)
end function

PersonDb.New = function(db)
    result    = new PersonDb
    result.db = db
    return result
end function
